arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers urges fans to ditch pyro after Celtic hit with SPFL sanctions.

arts.ttl: Maeda, Dalby & St Mirren decisions wrong - Collum
arts.sum: Celtic and Dundee United's disallowed goals in Scottish Premiership defeats by Hibernian last month should have stood, says Scottish FA head of refereeing Willie Collum.

arts.ttl: Hibs fans sell out biggest Celtic Park away allocation in SEVEN years to set up Scottish Cup blockbuster
arts.sum: The green-and-white followers from Leith will back their team in huge numbers this weekend in Glasgow

arts.ttl: Benitez or Mourinho for Rangers, Maeda Celtic transfer price named and your Cheltenham Festival banker
arts.sum: Join our team every Friday for a mix of serious debate and a lighter look at the major sporting events

arts.ttl: Maeda, Dalby & St Mirren decisions wrong - Collum
arts.sum: Celtic and Dundee United's disallowed goals in defeats by Hibs should have stood, says SFA refereeing head Willie Collum, who also says St Mirren should have had a penalty against Celtic. And Collum also believes St Mirren should have been awarded a penalty in their league loss to Celtic.

arts.ttl: Celtic among UEFA elite as club cash sees Hoops ranked in top 10 for one particular element
arts.sum: GRV Media’s finance expert Adam Williams this week suggested Celtic’s revenue could reach £150million this season and that appears to be in line with UEFA’s reports putting the Scottish giants in the top 10 for largest pre-tax profits recorded in 2024. As well as the top 10 list for pre-tax profit, Celtic also sit in the top 20 clubs around Europe for kit and merchandising sales in 2024.

arts.ttl: Willie Collum fronts up to Daizen Maeda no goal audio as SFA ref chief admits to two WRONG calls involving Celtic
arts.sum: The Hoops were at the centre of two controversies in the Scottish Premiership during to high profile incidents

arts.ttl: Audio released from Daizen Maeda’s Hibernian v Celtic disallowed goal
arts.sum: Audio released from Daizen Maeda’s Hibernian v Celtic disallowed goal

arts.ttl: Jeffrey Schlupp names Celtic moment that's 'still sore'
arts.sum: What Schlupp said about scoring his first Celtic goal “It’s always nice to get involved with goals and assists so I play to win, if I can help in any way I’ll do that.
